【无敌流】【召唤流】【全员无敌】【全员设定级】【一路爽推】
一睁眼，雷伦发现自己来到了海贼的世界。
更不巧的是，此时一艘棺材船飘过，雷伦与船边蹲着拉巴巴的男人对视了......
不过好在雷伦有穿越者标配的金手指。
让他拥有了召唤伙伴的能力。
但是......
雷伦发现，自己召唤的伙伴，似乎是有些太强了！
“我是一个兴趣使然的英雄。”——琦玉
“仁义道德，也是一种奢侈。”——亚索
“花团锦簇的节日用来铭记逝者，而我，宁愿被人遗忘。”——永恩
“和睦相处，只不过是弱者的一种自欺欺人的想法罢了。”——冥王
“阁下很强，但与森林里两位故友比起，还是略逊一筹。”——只强
......
这个世界太糟糕。
但是，好在这个世界也足够的精彩！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/080ac160a0dcbd77a8d45700fac858fe","author":"幽冥夜神","author_id":"","book_id":"7590384320284462104","book_name":"海贼：我只想旅行，别再来送死了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#487898","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7590765061887509016","read_count":"63343","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"284369"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"109","tags":"动漫衍生,海贼,无敌,开局,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/051bc70b849aeb830ea6b854221e74db~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779315797&x-signature=IE3TaFke211c6gFKzkTcuaK81VM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2788824371691779","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"66"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206231779DF56715364F440C736"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"l
